response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video. The video contains an introductory sequence followed by a prolonged speaking segment by the VTuber Kureiji Ollie. While there is instrumental background music playing throughout the video, there are no instances of vocal singing or lyrics being sung. Therefore, no song detection or lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an intro sequence followed by a spoken monologue from the VTuber Kureiji Ollie. The video features instrumental background music throughout, but no vocal singing is performed.

Kureiji Ollie speaks to the camera, with the title "Crazy になるほど 恋している ZOMBIE" displayed on screen. The background music is instrumental.
